reasoning: After comprehensive searching, I found no evidence of any imminent presidential action on Diversity Visa before July 1, 2025. This is relatively recent (only ~6 weeks before the knowledge cutoff) and directly addresses the question. Multiple searches for whitehouse.gov actions, May 2025 interviews, and recent statements found no mentions of Diversity Visa. With only 42 days between the knowledge cutoff (May 20) and the deadline (July 1), and no recent signals or mentions, this makes the probability quite low.
